cli: Add interactive upload command with transcript discovery

- New `agentlogs upload` command with interactive TUI picker
- Discovers transcripts from Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode
- Supports directory filtering (e.g., `agentlogs upload .`)
- Supports source filtering (`--source claude-code`)
- Auto-select latest with `--latest` flag
- Fast partial file reading for performance (~430ms for 100 transcripts)
- Updated docs with npx prefix for all CLI commands

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/lowtvdvjzzs0b767vn12dhkk

web: Add team dashboard with analytics and member management

- Add team dashboard page with activity metrics, charts, and member table
- Add queries for team stats, activity by user, model/agent usage
- Add getTeamDashboardData server function with period filtering
- Support hourly grouping for 24h view, daily for longer periods
- Include input validation (1-365 days) and UTC timezone consistency
- Delete old team.tsx, merge member management into dashboard

Fix hooks not receiving stdin by using async flag

The background execution with `&` was disconnecting stdin, causing
PostToolUse, Stop, and SessionEnd hooks to receive empty data.

Use Claude Code's native `async: true` flag instead, which properly
handles background execution while preserving stdin.

shared: Add sensitive file redaction for known secret files

- Fully redact contents of .env, .zshrc, SSH keys, AWS credentials, etc.
- Redaction replaces non-whitespace with * while preserving structure
- Applied to Read/Write tool calls before pattern-based secret detection
- Template files (.env.example, .env.sample) are excluded
- Added comprehensive tests with snapshots
- Updated secret-redaction docs

Add Pi support

- Add @agentlogs/pi extension package for automatic transcript capture
- Add Pi session converter (packages/shared/src/pi.ts) with branch-aware IDs
- Add CLI commands: pi hook, pi upload
- Add Pi to interactive upload discovery
- Add Pi documentation and changelog entry
- Add test fixtures for linear and branched sessions

The extension uploads transcripts after each turn (agent_end) and on
session shutdown. Git commits are enhanced with transcript links.

Update sync script to use ~/.agents instead of ~/.codex

shared: Skip uploading Claude Code transcripts with no messages after filtering

Previously, transcripts containing only ignored commands like /clear would
still be converted and uploaded with messageCount=0, resulting in empty
logs in the UI.

Now we return null (like pi.ts, opencode.ts, codex.ts already do) when the
messages array is empty after filtering out:
- isMeta messages
- Ignored commands (/clear)
- Command stdout from ignored commands

Added test cases for this edge case.

opencode: Use CLI commands instead of reading storage files directly

This change prepares the plugin for OpenCode's SQLite migration by using
the `opencode export` and `opencode session list` commands instead of
reading directly from the JSON file storage at ~/.local/share/opencode/.

- hook.ts: Use `opencode export` to read session data
- upload.ts (opencode): Use `opencode export` to read session data
- upload.ts (main): Use `opencode export` for reading sessions
- discovery.ts: Use `opencode session list --format json` for discovery
  with async spawn to allow parallel execution with other sources

Gracefully handles missing opencode installation by returning empty results.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/kgyyc94cxbov1ik3mu93c6uc

ci: upgrade to Node 24 for npm trusted publishing

npm trusted publishing requires npm 11.5.1+. Node 22 ships with npm 10.9.4,
which causes auth failures. Node 24 ships with npm 11.6.2.

web: Rewrite landing page from scratch

Build a fresh landing page from content alone — completely different
structure and design approach:

- Centered hero with agent icons in a row, not inline in heading
- Alternating left/right feature rows with images, not 3-col cards
- Single-column FAQ with native <details> elements
- Centered CTA section
- Compact footer with links and social in one row
- Uses existing design tokens (bg-background, text-foreground, etc.)
- Uses font-display (Instrument Serif) for headings
- Self-contained routes, no shared landing component file
- Remove olive color palette from CSS (was for oatmeal)

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/rqh81xp1jc3nvy2pvul6ycfk

web: Replace paid Tailwind Plus (oatmeal) components with simple alternatives

Create a single landing.tsx with custom components that preserve the same
aesthetics and content: dark theme, gradient wallpaper screenshots, FAQ
accordion, hero/features/CTA sections, footer with social links.

Remove the entire oatmeal/ directory (23 files, ~930 lines).

commit.message:
Serve raw markdown via content negotiation

When a request includes Accept: text/markdown, return the raw markdown
content instead of the HTML page. Works for blog posts, notes, and the
root page.

  curl -H 'Accept: text/markdown' localhost:3000/
  curl -H 'Accept: text/markdown' localhost:3000/blog/how-i-use-claude-code
  curl -H 'Accept: text/markdown' localhost:3000/note/engineering/great-engineers

Revert "Disable transparent Tauri window"

This reverts commit 6c0b44af95e442538a0387f33d79333ca28568e0.
Use opaque background for terminal theme

Add Toggle Developer Tools command

Enable devtools feature in Tauri (hidden by default). Register
view.toggleDevTools as a client-owned extension command so it
appears in the command palette. Handle it in both the keybinding
handler and the palette dispatcher via invoke("toggle_devtools").

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/l2i7fpohi3nx7ly20z4shzn2

build: Bundle native resources for production sidecar

Copy pi-coding-agent/package.json and ripgrep binary from
node_modules during server postbuild. Bundle both as Tauri
resources and pass PI_PACKAGE_DIR and RG_PATH env vars to the
sidecar. Gitignore the copied artifacts.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/l2i7fpohi3nx7ly20z4shzn2

server: Fix file-index Worker in compiled Bun binary

Three issues prevented the Worker from running in bun --compile:

1. Worker file not embedded: pass worker.ts as a second entry
   point to bun build so it's included in the binary.

2. Wrong module path: compiled Bun strips the common src/ prefix
   and transpiles .ts→.js, so the worker lives at
   $bunfs/root/file-index/worker.js. Detect compiled mode via
   import.meta.url and resolve accordingly.

3. ripgrep binary missing: read RG_PATH env var with fallback to
   the @vscode/ripgrep default.

Also improve Worker error logging so crashes are visible.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/l2i7fpohi3nx7ly20z4shzn2

client: Replace @vite-ignore dynamic import with static module map

Vite cannot serve unbundled source files through Tauri's custom
protocol. The @vite-ignore dynamic import() returned text/html
instead of JS in production. Map extension panels to explicit
static imports so Vite bundles them as proper lazy chunks.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/l2i7fpohi3nx7ly20z4shzn2

client: Strip crossorigin attribute from Vite production HTML

Vite 7 hardcodes crossorigin on injected script/link tags.
Tauri's tauri:// custom protocol doesn't serve CORS headers,
so WKWebView silently blocks the assets. A post-build plugin
strips the attribute.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/l2i7fpohi3nx7ly20z4shzn2

client: Refactor rpc.ts to remove top-level await

Top-level await freezes WKWebView's JS runtime in production
Rollup bundles. Export an init() async function instead and
call it from main.tsx before mounting React.

agent: Fix message streaming with raw iterator and server-authoritative tails

Replace React Query's experimental_liveOptions (which silently drops
events during React batching) with a raw async iterator loop over a
mutable ref. Add server-side messageTail on checkpoint events
(turn_end, agent_end, auto_compaction_end) carrying only new messages
since the snapshot, so the client can self-correct on every turn
boundary.

agent: Add ANSI escape code rendering via Ghostty WASM

- Lazy WASM loading (singleton), cell-to-HTML span conversion
- Detects ANSI codes in bash output and routes to AnsiOutput
- Handles bg color blocks, default color exclusion, CR/LF normalization
- Graceful fallback: strips ANSI and shows plain text while loading

Agent chat: replace use-stick-to-bottom with manual scroll anchoring

Drop the use-stick-to-bottom dependency in favor of a two-mode scroll
system: auto-scroll (pinned to bottom during initial load and streaming)
and anchor mode (viewport-stable after user interaction). A ResizeObserver
that fires before paint either scrolls to the bottom or restores the
saved anchor node position, so collapsible expand/collapse, async diff
highlighting, and streaming all work without flicker in every browser.

Fix tab reopen, focus already-open files, and restore focus after tab close

- closeTab now also removes the panel from session and notifies the
  extension Panel instance via onPanelClosed so it marks itself disposed
- openTab prevents duplicate tabs for the same panel
- Files extension detects disposed panels and creates fresh ones on reopen
- files.open returns panelId; command palette and diff view use it to
  request focus via a client-side event bus (tab-focus.ts)
- Add usePanelFocus hook so panel components (terminal, editor) register
  focus handlers that get called on tab activation and after tab close
- Capture focus-in-tabs flag before calling api.close() since dockview
  blurs the element before onDidRemovePanel fires
- Add ExtensionPanelProps.id so panel components know their panel ID
